title: Afterlands SMP S4/S3.5 Modpack
description: The official modpack for the afterlands SMP. A server with elements of roleplaying, chaos and fun! This will be our fourth season, and i think it might shape up to be the best one yet.
body:
Modpack for my lil' server SMP, sharing the same name. This shall be the fourth season of the server, with more roleplaying elements chaos and fun. 

Adds a number of mods which allow for building grand areas we call 'empires'. Whilst also including a world chock full of structures and brand new mobs and biomes to explore. These mods include the likes of Biomes O' Plenty, Comforts, Chipped, Farmer's Delight and more!
This pack also supports Voice Chat for Co-operative play as it was designed for a server.
